messages.content: [mindmap output, near memory context, memory stats table — session 30dbb00c initialized]
would it be better to use worktree on new session start ?

No — worktrees won't help. The problem is Claude behavior (summarizing instead of copying verbatim), not file state. A worktree gives an isolated copy of the same files, same problem.

Latest session (30dbb00c) far_memory msg 2 is just '[mindmap output, near memory context, memory stats table — session 30dbb00c initialized]' — not even a summary, just a description. The SKILL.md fix (COPY verbatim) hasn't been tested yet since this session started before the fix.

Suggested next steps: push updated SKILL.md and test, or make the skill output self-rendering so Claude just passes it through.
wait, i was just asking. i will look the results on the new session...

Got it — take your time looking at the new session results. The updated SKILL.md with the 'COPY verbatim' instruction should be active for this session (30dbb00c) since the file was changed before it started. Let me know what you see.
